subject: fix(security): sanitize login errors and cap bulk import size
body:
Login: Replace raw Supabase error messages with a generic user-facing
message to prevent leaking internal auth system details.

Bulk import: Add 5000-item cap on parsed JSON arrays to prevent UI
freeze from extremely large imports (SA has ~5000 stations total).

Tags: security, admin, validation
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: security-hardening
Semver: patch
